SELECT age, roundAge(age) FROM age_test WHERE age < 1;
SELECT age, roundAge(age) FROM age_test WHERE age >= 1 AND age <= 17;
SELECT age, roundAge(age) FROM age_test WHERE age >= 18 AND age <= 24;
SELECT age, roundAge(age) FROM age_test WHERE age >= 25 AND age <= 34;
SELECT age, roundAge(age) FROM age_test WHERE age >= 35 AND age <= 44;
SELECT age, roundAge(age) FROM age_test WHERE age >= 45 AND age <= 54;
SELECT age, roundAge(age) FROM age_test WHERE age >= 55;
SELECT age, roundAge(age) FROM age_test WHERE age IN (0, 1, 17, 18, 24, 25, 34, 35, 44, 45, 54, 55, 72);
SELECT roundAge(age) AS rounded_age, COUNT(*) FROM age_test GROUP BY rounded_age;
SELECT a.age, b.rounded_age FROM age_test AS a JOIN (SELECT age, roundAge(age) AS rounded_age FROM age_test) AS b ON a.age = b.age;
SELECT age, roundAge(age) AS rounded_age FROM age_test WHERE roundAge(age) > 0 ORDER BY age DESC;
CREATE TABLE age_validation (id UInt32, age UInt8);
SELECT v.age, roundAge(v.age) FROM age_validation AS v JOIN age_test AS t ON v.age = t.age WHERE v.age < 50;
SELECT (SELECT roundAge(age) FROM age_validation WHERE id = 1) AS age1, (SELECT roundAge(age) FROM age_validation WHERE id = 2) AS age2;
